compiled_state.title: Write Part C smoke test: verify behavioral-testing-standard.md consumer scan finds 7+ files
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create tests/scripts/test-part-c-smoke-behavioral-testing-standard.sh.

Single test function: test_part_c_scan_finds_min_7_consumers
- Uses grep to count files referencing 'behavioral-testing-standard' in the repo
- Excludes: .git/, .tickets-tracker/, and the standard file itself (skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md)
- Asserts count >= 7 (20+ currently exist, well above threshold)
- Sources tests/lib/assert.sh and uses assert.sh helpers

Register the new test in .test-index mapping epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md to this test file.

testing_mode: GREEN (scan mechanism already works; test validates existing state)

## Why
Done Definition 1 of story e644-9a50 requires a smoke test that verifies Part C would enumerate 7+ consumers of behavioral-testing-standard.md — the motivating artifact from the 8df3-61d0 gap.
